name: react-admin-kit
description: Reusable patterns for building and auditing React / Next.js admin panels. Covers admin shell, CRUD lists, forms, role-aware UI, dangerous-action confirmations, import/export, RTL/LTR, loading/error/empty states, and the UI-level security rules every admin panel needs (UI hide is not authorization, PII masking, audit visibility, file upload safety).
